EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IEdgeFeatureSource

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a network dataset source whose edge elements are derived from line geometry.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CC16E6DB-051A-4CCB-ADAF-0CA823ECD00B")]
public interface IEdgeFeatureSource

Properties

ClassConnectivityGroup

Connectivity group in which this edge feature source participates.

int ClassConnectivityGroup { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassConnectivityPolicy

Policy determining how all edge elements in this source connect to each other.

esriNetworkEdgeConnectivityPolicy ClassConnectivityPolicy { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkEdgeConnectivityPolicy

Examples

Sample Snippet

FromElevationFieldName

The field name on the feature source to be used as the from elevation field when determining connectivity at coincident end vertices.

string FromElevationFieldName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SubtypeConnectivityGroup[int]

Connectivity group in which the specified subtype of this edge feature source participates.

int SubtypeConnectivityGroup[int SubtypeCode] { get; set; }

Parameters

SubtypeCode int

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

SubtypeConnectivityPolicy[int]

Policy determining how the edge elements in the specified subtype of this source connect to each other.

esriNetworkEdgeConnectivityPolicy SubtypeConnectivityPolicy[int SubtypeCode] { get; set; }

Parameters

SubtypeCode int

Property Value

esriNetworkEdgeConnectivityPolicy

Examples

Sample Snippet

ToElevationFieldName

The field name on the feature source to be used as the to elevation field when determining connectivity at coincident end vertices.

string ToElevationFieldName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

UsesSubtypes

Indicates if this edge feature source determines connectivity groups and policies by subtypes.

bool UsesSubtypes { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet
